attackStance.semantics: The base bonus applies with no support. Each rank then adds the listed delta, cumulatively through the reached support rank.

guardStance.semantics: Pair Up discards Attack Stance support-unit boosts and applies a standard Dodge +5. Personal stat deltas are cumulative across C, B, A, and S and are added to class Pair Up stats.
